ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the individual */,
  "first" TEXT /* First name of the individual */,
  "last" TEXT /* Last name of the individual */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "age_cat" TEXT /* Categorization of age (e.g., Less than 25, 25 - 45, Greater than 45) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual */,
  "social_security_number" TEXT /* Anonymized social security number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Last known address */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status */,
  "mental_health_status" TEXT /* Mental health status */,
  "drug_alcohol_history" INTEGER /* History of drug or alcohol abuse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the risk assessment (linked to individual) */,
  "compas_screening_date" TEXT /* Date of COMPAS screening */,
  "juv_fel_count" INTEGER /* Count of juvenile felony offenses */,
  "decile_score" INTEGER /* Decile score from the assessment */,
  "juv_misd_count" INTEGER /* Count of juvenile misdemeanor offenses */,
  "priors_count" INTEGER /* Count of prior offenses */,
  "days_b_screening_arrest" INTEGER /* Days between screening and latest arrest */,
  "is_recid" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the individual has a prior conviction */,
  "assessment_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to assessment types */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Categorized risk level */,
  "assessment_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer conducting the assessment */,
  "assessment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations from the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arrests" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the arrest record (linked to individual) */,
  "c_jail_in" TEXT /* Timestamp of jail entry */,
  "c_jail_out" TEXT /* Timestamp of jail exit */,
  "c_case_number" TEXT /* Case number associated with the charge */,
  "c_offense_date" TEXT /* Date of offense */,
  "c_arrest_date" TEXT /* Date of arrest */,
  "c_days_from_compas" INTEGER /* Days from COMPAS screening to arrest */,
  "c_charge_degree" TEXT /* Degree of charge (e.g., Felony, Misdemeanor) */,
  "c_charge_desc" TEXT /* Description of the charge */,
  "arresting_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the arresting officer */,
  "incident_report_id" INTEGER /* ID linking to a detailed incident report */,
  "bail_amount" TEXT /* Amount of bail set */,
  "court_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the court case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recidivism" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the recidivism record (linked to individual) */,
  "vr_case_number" TEXT /* Case number for violent recidivism assessment */,
  "vr_charge_degree" TEXT /* Degree of charge for violent recidivism */,
  "vr_offense_date" TEXT /* Date of violent offense */,
  "vr_charge_desc" TEXT /* Description of the violent charge */,
  "violent_recid" INTEGER /* Count of violent recidivism offenses */,
  "is_violent_recid" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the recidivism is violent */,
  "recidivism_date" TEXT /* Date of recidivism */,
  "recidivism_location" TEXT /* Location of recidivism */,
  "recidivism_offense_type" TEXT /* Type of recidivism offense */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_types" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the assessment type */,
  "type_of_assessment" TEXT /* Type of assessment conducted (e.g., Risk of Recidivism, Risk of Violence) */,
  "decile_score" INTEGER /* Decile score associated with the assessment */,
  "score_text" TEXT /* Text representation of the score category (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "screening_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "assessment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the assessment type */,
  "assessment_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
column_names: Categorization of age (e.g., Less than 25, 25 - 45, Greater than 45)
History of drug or alcohol abuse
Unique identifier for the risk assessment (linked to individual)
